name: Chickpeas
summary: A versatile pulse high in fiber and plant protein, studied as part of the legume family for improving cardiometabolic markers.

benefits.mechanism: Chickpeas are high in soluble fiber and plant protein and naturally low in saturated fat and sodium. A 2024 systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized trials found higher legume intake improved the cardiometabolic risk profile (including lipids and glycemic markers).

citations.title: Legume intakes on cardiometabolic profile and gut microbiome function: systematic review and meta-analyses of randomised controlled trials (2024)

benefits.claim: Fiber that feeds the gut and keeps you full
benefits.mechanism: The mix of soluble and insoluble fiber in chickpeas slows digestion — flattening the post-meal blood-sugar rise and prolonging fullness — and feeds beneficial gut bacteria that ferment it into short-chain fatty acids.

citations.title: Legume intakes on cardiometabolic profile and gut microbiome function: systematic review and meta-analyses of randomised controlled trials (2024)

surprisingFacts.text: The starchy water from a can of chickpeas — aquafaba — whips up like egg whites and is used as a vegan meringue and mayonnaise base.
